title: Melania Trump Promotes ‘Peace Through Education’ at U.N. as War With Iran Expands
author: Chris Cameron
fullText: The first lady advocated an increased focus on education and empathy, as her husband has waged war in the Middle East and sought to cut education funding at home.
summary: The first lady advocated an increased focus on education and empathy, as her husband has waged war in the Middle East and sought to cut education funding at home.
